title: Mo.Blend Template Manifest
description: Canonical schema for the JSON manifest embedded in a .mo.blend template (bpy.context.scene['moblend_manifest']) and extracted alongside the binary in the registry as <name>.manifest.json. This is the single source of truth for the manifest contract shared by the engine (PRD 2), the broker (PRD 3), all UI clients (PRD 4/5/6), and the registry CI (PRD 7). The schema is published at https://moblend.dev/schemas/manifest-v1.schema.json (and referenced by the official template library at lib.moblend.dev).

version.description: Manifest schema version. v1 of the schema uses "1.0". This is distinct from the template's own content version in metadata.template_version.

template_version.description: Template content version (SemVer). Bump major when a parameter id/type is removed or changed incompatibly (see PRD 7 §6).

slot_presets.description: Named animation behaviors a slot can run, referenced by PATCH /api/v1/slots and engine.set_slot(preset_id=...).

slots.description: Default slot layout (time blocks) the template ships with. Times are in seconds.

parameterType.description: Canonical Mo.Blend parameter type registry. Clients map each type to a UI control (see PRD 4 §6.2) and the engine coerces it to the target Blender socket value (see PRD 2 §3).

id.description: Stable parameter id referenced by the API (PATCH /api/v1/parameters) and MCP tools.

ui_group.description: Optional grouping for the auto-generated inspector panel (e.g. "Typography", "Style").

node_target.description: Name of the target node group or material that owns the input socket, e.g. "NodeGroup_TextGen".

socket_identifier.description: Stable Blender node-tree interface socket identifier (e.g. "Socket_2"), NOT a positional index. Identifiers survive socket reordering; positional indices do not (see PRD 2 §3).

default.description: Default value, encoded per type (hex string for color_rgba, number for float/int, etc.).
